📋
Daily Business Report
Complete end-of-day reminder — payments today, new overdue, pending actions, penalties triggered, loans maturing, and full cash position.
Last generated: —
📊
Executive Summary
One-page management report — all KPIs, portfolio health score, top 5 overdue, last 5 payments, and action items on a single A4 page.
Last generated: —
💚
Portfolio Health Score
Composite RAG rating — collection rate, PAR ratio, penalty recovery, and client risk combined into one business health index with recommendations.
Last generated: —
📅
Weekly Business Summary
7-day view — new loans added, total collected this week, new overdue, new clients enrolled, and week-on-week comparisons.
Last generated: —
📆
Monthly Business Review
This month vs last month — side-by-side comparison of disbursements, collections, new clients, PAR change, and revenue.
Last generated: —
📊
Collections Summary
Full portfolio overview — total disbursed, collected, outstanding, and collection rate across all loans.
Last generated: —
📅
Daily Collections Sheet
Printable field sheet showing who is due to pay today or this week — with phone, loan #, and amount due columns.
Last generated: —
🗓️
Monthly Repayment Schedule
Every client due to pay this month, grouped by week — with amounts, balances, and running totals.
Last generated: —
📋
Disbursement Register
All loans issued in the selected period — loan numbers, amounts, interest rates, officers, and disbursement dates.
Last generated: —
📆
Loan Maturity Report
Loans maturing in the next 30, 60, or 90 days — plan ahead for expected incoming payments and renewals.
Last generated: —
📲
SMS Reminder List
All overdue clients with phone numbers — formatted for easy bulk SMS or WhatsApp follow-up campaigns.
Last generated: —
🔴
Arrears Report
All overdue loans with days past due, balances outstanding, and accrued penalties.
Last generated: —
📉
PAR Aging Report
Portfolio at Risk broken into aging buckets: 1–30, 31–60, 61–90, and 90+ days overdue with % of total portfolio.
Last generated: —
🚫
Defaulters List
Loans overdue by more than 90 days — contact details, amounts, and last payment dates for recovery action.
Last generated: —
👁️
Watch List Report
Loans 1–90 days overdue — early warning system before loans become full defaulters. Includes last contact notes.
Last generated: —
⚡
Penalty Accumulation Report
Detailed penalty charges per loan — daily rate, number of days charged, total penalties accrued vs paid.
Last generated: —
💰
Revenue Analysis
Interest income, penalty income, and total revenue breakdown per loan with yield-on-portfolio ratio.
Last generated: —
📊
Portfolio Summary
Loans by status, age buckets, loan type distribution, and top borrowers by outstanding balance.
Last generated: —
⚡
Penalty Income Statement
All penalties charged and collected — total penalty income, outstanding penalties, and collection rate on penalties.
Last generated: —
🏷️
Loan Type Breakdown
Portfolio split by loan type — count, total disbursed, total collected, PAR, and average loan size per category.
Last generated: —
👥
Client Performance
All clients ranked by repayment performance — total borrowed, total paid, % repaid, and active loan count.
Last generated: —
📋
Client Profile Report
Comprehensive profile for a selected client — loan history, payment record, collateral, and risk score.
Last generated: —
🔄
Repeat Borrowers Report
Clients with 2 or more loans — loyalty analysis showing total borrowed, total loans, average loan, and reliability score.
Last generated: —
🏆
Top Clients Report
Top 20 clients by total amount borrowed, repayment rate, and number of loans — ideal for loyalty programs.
Last generated: —
📊
New Client Acquisition
Clients registered per month for the last 12 months — shows growth trends and acquisition momentum.
Last generated: —
🎯
Client Risk Scorecard
Every client scored 0–100 based on overdue history, penalty charges, repayment rate, and days late — color-coded RAG rating.
Last generated: —
😴
Dormant Clients
Clients with no loan or payment activity in the last 60+ days — flagged for re-engagement or follow-up calls.
Last generated: —
⚖️
Client Concentration Risk
Clients with 2+ active loans simultaneously — total exposure per client, combined balance, and concentration ratio of portfolio.
Last generated: —
📝
Payment Register
Full list of all payments in the selected period — date, client, loan #, amount, payment method, and reference number.
Last generated: —
💳
Payment Method Analysis
Cash vs Mobile Money vs Bank Transfer vs Cheque — count, total value, and % share of all collections by payment type.
Last generated: —
⏰
Late Payment Analysis
Payments made after the due date — how many days late each was, chronic late-payer patterns, and per-client lateness score.
Last generated: —
🔀
Partial Payment Tracker
Loans with payments received but still less than 50% of total due repaid — identifies at-risk accounts needing immediate follow-up.
Last generated: —
📐
Payment Consistency Report
Per client: expected payments vs actual payments made — consistency score showing who pays regularly vs sporadically.
Last generated: —
📋
Penalty Event Log
Every penalty charged across all loans — date applied, loan number, client, amount, type (auto/manual), and paid status.
Last generated: —
🔄
Penalty Recovery Report
Per loan: total penalties charged, total collected, outstanding, and recovery percentage — sorted by highest unrecovered first.
Last generated: —
🔥
Highest Penalty Accounts
Top 10 accounts with the most unrecovered penalties — priority intervention list for collection officers to chase.
Last generated: —
📈
Monthly Penalty Revenue Trend
12-month view — penalties charged vs collected each month, showing penalty income trends and efficiency of penalty recovery.
Last generated: —
⚡
Penalty Accumulation Report
Per loan: daily penalty rate, number of days charged, total penalties accrued vs total paid — shows who is accumulating fastest.
Last generated: —

Under-Covered Loans

Forfeited Assets Register

Last generated: —
💵
Cash Flow Projection
Expected collections for the next 3 months broken by month — based on due dates and outstanding balances.
Last generated: —
⚖️
Daily Reconciliation
All payments received today — running total, payment methods breakdown, and officer summary for end-of-day close.
Last generated: —
📬
Outstanding Demand Letters
Pre-formatted demand letter list for overdue clients — ready to send or print for official follow-up.
Last generated: —
📧
Penalty Notices Batch
Individual penalty notice letters for all overdue clients — printable A5 notices with penalty breakdown and payment instructions.
Last generated: —
📈
Monthly Portfolio Trend
Month-by-month portfolio growth — disbursements, collections, and outstanding balance for the last 12 months.
Last generated: —
🔢
Quarterly Comparison
Side-by-side comparison of key metrics across all 4 quarters — disbursements, collections, PAR, and revenue.
Last generated: —
📊
Annual Summary Report
Full year overview — total loans issued, revenue earned, clients served, recovery rate, and year-on-year growth.
Last generated: —

⚙️ Settings & Configuration

🏢 Company Settings

PNG/JPG recommended.
Max 500KB. Shows on receipts.

👔 Authorizing Officer Profile

Your details will appear on official documents as the authorizing/signing officer.

Draw your signature above (appears on agreements)

👤 Manage My Account

Manage your login credentials, session behavior, and account profile.

🕐 Current Session

Logged In As
—
Role
—
Login Time
—
Session Duration

💰 Loan Default Settings

Configure defaults used when creating new loans. Individual loans can override these.

Monthly/period interest rate for new loans
Default term length in days
Payment structure for new loans
How interest is computed
Minimum allowed disbursement
Maximum allowed disbursement
Prefix for auto-generated loan numbers
One-time fee deducted at disbursement

⚠️ Penalty & Late Fee Settings

Configure how penalties are calculated and applied to overdue loans.

Percentage charged per day for overdue loans
Days after due date before penalties apply
Maximum penalty as % of principal (0 = no cap)
Automatically calculates and records penalties for overdue loans when app opens

📦 Collateral Settings

Configure collateral handling and forfeiture rules.

% of registered value accepted when forfeited
Days past due before collateral can be forfeited

💳 Payment Allocation Rules

Configure how payments are allocated when received.

Order in which payments are applied
Minimum % of installment to accept

✅ Early Settlement

Configure discounts for clients who settle loans early.

�️ Print & Export Preferences

🌙 Dark Print Theme
Use dark background on all printed reports and statements

This applies to: Loan Statements, Penalty Notices, Reconciliation Reports, and Amortization Schedules.

📁 Data Storage Location

Manage where your MIGL data, backups, and client files are stored.

Current Storage Location
Loading...
All database, backups, and client files stored here
💡 About Data Storage:
  • All MIGL data including database, backups, and client files
  • Can be local drive, external USB, or network location
  • Changing location will copy all data to the new folder
  • Old location can be kept or deleted after successful migration

Backup & Restore

Create backups of your data for safekeeping. Restore from a previous backup anytime.

⚠️ Reset Application

Reset MIGL to factory defaults. This will delete all data!

⚠️ Warning: Resetting will permanently delete:
  • All clients and their data
  • All loans, payments, and penalties
  • All collateral records
  • All documents and files
  • All settings and user accounts
  • Audit log and history

Support & Help

MIGL v...

Get help, manage your license, run diagnostics, and find answers.

🚀 Getting Started with MIGL

1️⃣
Activate License
Go to License tab and enter your key
2️⃣
Set Up Company
Configure company details in Settings
3️⃣
Add Clients
Create client profiles and documents
4️⃣
Create Loans
Issue loans and track payments

📖 Documentation

Click a document above to load it here.

🔒
Checking License...

🖥️ Machine ID

Loading...

Send this ID to support to receive your license key.

🔓 Activate License

Enter key starting with MIG2-

📊 License Tier & Limits

Loading tier information...

🔑 Feature Access

Loading...

📝 Old License (v1.0)? Contact support to upgrade to the secure v2.0 system.

❓ Frequently Asked Questions

1. Go to the License tab in this Support section

2. Copy your Machine ID and send it to support

3. You'll receive a license key (format: MIG2-...)

4. Paste it in the activation field and click Activate

v1.0 (MIG-...): Old format with basic hash verification

v2.0 (MIG2-...): New format with ECDSA digital signatures

  • Cryptographically signed — can't be forged or tampered with
  • Machine-bound for security
  • Includes feature flags and tier information

Contact support to upgrade from v1.0 to v2.0.

This means your license was generated for a different computer.

Solution: Copy your current Machine ID from the License tab and contact support for a new license tied to this computer.

Expired licenses limit access to certain features. To renew:

  • Contact support with your Machine ID
  • Request a renewed license
  • Activate the new key in the License tab

No, each license is tied to a specific Machine ID for security. If you need to use MIGL on multiple computers, contact support for a multi-machine license option.

⚠️ Warning: This indicates your license may have been tampered with.

  • Do not use this license
  • Contact support immediately
  • Request a new, valid license

MIGL automatically creates rolling backups (up to 5). You can also:

  • Go to Settings → Backup & Restore for manual backup
  • Configure automatic backup scheduling (hourly, daily, weekly)
  • Restore from any backup point if needed

Run Diagnostics → Self-Check to verify your backup health.

MIGL supports several export formats:

  • CSV: Available for all lists (clients, loans, payments, expenses)
  • PDF: Available for reports and loan summaries (requires Pro tier)
  • Print: Built-in print preview for any table or report

Look for the export/print buttons in each section's toolbar.

🩺 Automated Self-Check

Run automated checks to identify common issues.

📋 Common Issues

🔴 App won't start / crashes on launch
  • Check if license has expired → Renew license
  • Verify correct Machine ID → Get new license
  • Check data folder accessibility → Verify permissions
  • Restart the application
🟡 App is slow / unresponsive
  • Close other applications to free memory
  • Create a backup and restart MIGL
  • Check available disk space (needs 500MB+ free)
  • Verify data folder is not on a slow network drive
🟢 License activation not working
  • Ensure using correct format (MIG2-...)
  • Copy-paste carefully (no extra spaces)
  • Verify Machine ID matches your computer
  • Check license expiry date
  • If key starts with "MIG-", contact support to upgrade
🔵 Data backup/restore issues
  • Ensure storage folder has write permissions
  • Check available disk space
  • Try manual backup first (Settings → Backup)
  • Verify backup location is accessible

📦 Generate Support Report

Create a diagnostic bundle with system info, license status, and recent errors — ready to send to support.

🖥️ System Information

Click Refresh or switch to this tab to load diagnostics.

⚙️ Application Info

🗄️ Database Info

📋 Log Viewer

Logs will load when you switch to this tab.

🦴 Error Guide — Common Issues & Fixes

Click a category to expand. Find your error, follow the fix steps.

ℹ️  🗄️ Database Errors (click to expand)
DB not loading / "DB not ready"
Wait 5 seconds and retry. If persistent: close the app, go to %APPDATA%\MIG\data\, copy a recent .db.bak file from the backups/ folder and rename it to migl.db, then restart.
Corrupted database / missing tables
Restore from backups folder first. Last resort: Settings → Reset Database (all data lost). Always keep manual backups.
Data not saving after changes
Ensure the app has write access to %APPDATA%\MIG\data\. Try running the app as Administrator once to create necessary directories.
App freezes / very slow on open
Audit log table may be very large. Check the DB Info section above for table counts. Contact support to trim the audit_log table.
ℹ️  🔐 License Errors (click to expand)
Invalid license format
License keys must start with MIG2- for v2.0. Older v1 keys (MIG-) only work for test licenses. Contact madeit360@gmail.com for a production v2 key.
License not valid for this computer
Keys are machine-bound. Copy your Machine ID from the License tab above and send it to support. They will generate a key tied to your machine.
License expired
Email madeit360@gmail.com with your Machine ID to renew. Include License Renewal Request in the subject. The upgrade button on the License tab will pre-fill the email.
Signature verification failed / tampered
This key is invalid or was modified. Discard it and request a fresh key from support. Never share or edit your license key.
Features still locked after activation
Go to Support → License tab, click the sub-tab to reload tier info. If still locked, deactivate and re-activate the key. Check if your tier includes the required feature.
ℹ️  📁 File & Storage Errors (click to expand)
Cannot upload photo / file
Ensure %APPDATA%\MIG\ClientFiles\ exists. Check disk space. Supported image formats: JPG, PNG, GIF. Max ~5MB per file.
Export or PDF fails
Check %APPDATA%\MIG\data\exports\ exists and is writable. For PDFs, make sure no other print dialog is open. Try a smaller date range for large exports.
Disk full / storage errors
Clear old exports from %APPDATA%\MIG\data\exports\. Trim backups in data\backups\ keeping only the last 3. MIGL auto-keeps 5 backups.
ℹ️  ⚡ Performance Issues (click to expand)
App starts slowly
Normal on first launch (<15s). If consistently slow: check DB size above. Large client/loan counts (5000+) will increase load time.
High memory usage (>85%)
Restart the app. Electron keeps all data in memory. Avoid keeping thousands of records visible simultaneously. The Diagnostics tab will warn you at 85%.
UI freezes for 1-2 seconds
This happens during DB write + backup creation. It is normal and safe. If freeze exceeds 10s, force-close and check for DB corruption.
ℹ️  🔑 Authentication Errors (click to expand)
Cannot login / password not working
Use the “Forgot Password” option. If unavailable, an Admin can reset accounts from Settings → User Management.
Session expired / auto-logged-out
Sessions expire after 30 minutes of inactivity. This is a security feature. Simply log in again.
No users in system / first login
If DB was reset, use the first-run setup to create an admin account. If setup is not shown, contact support.
ℹ️  📡 App Crash / IPC Errors (click to expand)
Blank white screen on start
Press F12 to open DevTools and check the Console for errors. Common cause: missing module. Reinstall the application.
App crashes on a specific action
Filter the Log Viewer above by ERROR. Generate a Support Report from the Troubleshoot tab, then email it to madeit360@gmail.com.
App won't start after update
Delete %APPDATA%\MIG\migl-config.json to reset config. Your data in %APPDATA%\MIG\data\ is safe.
